title: Vineyard Irrigation: Season-Weighted Moisture-Predicate Prefix-Cache Ordering
strategies: identity layout: evaluate predicates in the given index order (baseline; low-index sprinkle predicates sit at the front and shatter every shared prefix)

frequency-first layout: order predicates by how many distinct checks reference them (ties by token weight), season weights ignored -- serves common cores but under-prioritizes the checks that actually run most often
season-weighted frequency layout: order predicates by total season-weighted occurrence so the cores of high-frequency check families lead every prefix

season-weighted greedy construction against the true weighted objective: fill the global order slot by slot, each time picking the predicate that maximizes total season-weighted cache-hit tokens, capturing cross-family ordering interactions
